root_text.sn46.36:1.1: “Sattime, bhikkhave, bojjhaṅgā bhāvitā bahulīkatā buddhiyā aparihānāya saṁvattanti.
root_text.sn46.36:1.4: Ime kho, bhikkhave, satta bojjhaṅgā bhāvitā bahulīkatā buddhiyā aparihānāya saṁvattantī”ti.

translation_text.sn46.36:1.1: “Mendicants, when the seven awakening factors are developed and cultivated they lead to growth and progress.
translation_text.sn46.36:1.3: The awakening factors of mindfulness, investigation of principles, energy, rapture, tranquility, immersion, and equanimity.
translation_text.sn46.36:1.4: When these seven awakening factors are developed and cultivated they lead to growth and progress.”
